title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.255 - Sale under junior judgment
text:
513.255.  Sale under junior judgment. — The sale of lands under a junior judgment or decree shall pass the title of the defendant, subject to the lien of all prior judgments and decrees then in force.
(RSMo 1939 § 1279) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1114; 1919 § 1565; 1909 § 2134
